content:
Calling’s Everyday is also really pleasant. I realize I’m just listing my favs now.

Stuck Inside should move earlier in the track list. There is god in the melody feels like a closer. It would be cool to hear more of that vocal delivery from Stuck Inside when the guitar comes in. Overall, experiment more with your voice and find some different vocal deliveries to spice things up a bit.

I also think Creame fits, somewhere near Stuck Inside. Eat me Like a Bug I also see fitting somewhere, not sure where yet. And finally IN A COUCH I can see where you’re going with, I’ll like to hear it when you’re finished.
context: From document: This definitely all sounds very different and exciting. Dropbox makes… — chunk 2 (chunk 2/2)
